ham.subject: Out of Office: Alex Thompson – Auto‑Reply
ham.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for your message. I am currently out of the office on vacation from May 15th to May 22nd, with limited access to email.

If your matter is urgent, please contact my colleague Maria Lopez at mlopez@company.com or call the office line at (555) 123‑4567.

I will respond to all non‑urgent emails upon my return.

Best regards,
Alex Thompson
Senior Analyst

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #98765 – Pay Now to Avoid Service Disruption
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected an outstanding invoice for QuickBooks/Norton services that requires immediate payment. The details are as follows:

- Invoice #: 98765
- Billing Period: April 2026
- Amount Due: $2,349.75
- Due Date: 24 hours from receipt of this email

Failure to remit payment within the specified timeframe will result in an automatic suspension of your QuickBooks and Norton services. To avoid interruption, please complete the payment promptly by clicking the secure link below:

<URL>

Once payment is confirmed, your services will be restored within 24 hours. For any questions or to verify the authenticity of this notice, contact our billing department at billing@quickbooks.com or call 1‑800‑123‑4567.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Billing Team
